source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative - German speaking
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for a curious and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our Commercial team. In this role, you’ll be essential in creating pipeline, driving outreach, and contributing to our revenue growth. You’ll focus on outbound prospecting, lead qualification, and generating high-quality meetings for our Account Executives (AEs).

As an SDR, you’ll be the first person a prospective customer speaks to. You will engage potential clients, understand their needs, and identify opportunities where Trengo can add value. Your work will directly influence new-logo acquisition, pipeline quality, and overall commercial success.

In short: you’ll spark conversations, create opportunities, and help fuel our sales engine!

 


ABOUT TRENGO

We believe in a world where technology empowers the relationship between companies and their customers. That’s why our mission is to build an AI-powered customer engagement platform to replace repetitive work with meaningful conversations. How do we do that? Our software makes it easy for customer-facing teams to communicate with customers and prospects via multiple channels, all in one shared inbox. Email, Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp, live-chat, you name it.

With a Series A investment of $36M led by Insight Partners and Peak Capital and being one of the four official WhatsApp Business Solutions Providers in the Netherlands, we empower our customers to scale their businesses and optimize the channels their clients truly prefer.

 


WHAT YOUR ROLE LOOKS LIKE

 - Proactively identify, engage, and follow up with potential customers through outbound channels (cold calls, emails, LinkedIn, social selling, and more).

 - Create specific industry/segment approaches through research and understanding of market primary needs

 - Lead discovery conversations to understand prospect needs, highlight how Trengo can help, and guide them toward a qualified opportunity.

 - Book high-quality meetings and demos for Account Executives, ensuring a smooth and informed handover.

 - Work closely with Marketing and RevOps to align on messaging, account prioritization, and CRM accuracy.

 - Continuously test and refine outreach strategies in collaboration with Marketing, using data to improve conversion rates.

 - Contribute to a high performing, collaborative commercial environment by sharing insights, learnings, and best practices.

 


HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED

 - Number of qualified meetings booked

 - Conversion rates (lead → meeting → opportunity)

 - Quality and consistency of CRM data

 - Contribution to overall pipeline and revenue growth

 


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 1–2+ years of experience in a Sales Development, BDR, or similar commercial role, preferably in an International SaaS or tech environment

 - Strong communication skills in English and German with a hunter mentality and a positive attitude

 - Comfortable picking up the phone and engaging in outbound motion regularly — you see feedback and “no’s” as part of the learning process

 - A structured and organized way of working: you enjoy using targets, cadences, and playbooks to guide your day.

 - A proactive and dynamic mindset with the willingness to continuously evolve with the industry requirements

 - Experience with CRM systems (particularly HubSpot) and sales tools (e.g LinkedIn Sales Navigator)

 - Interest in AI, automation, and the future of customer communication

 


WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU?

We believe in supporting you to perform at your best and grow with us:

 - 🚀 Career growth with clear departmental tracks and support from your manager.

 - 🌍 Hybrid working + 2 months per year to work abroad.

 - 🧘 Mental health support with free sessions from on-demand psychologists (OpenUp) https://openup.com/nl/.

 - 📚 Learning budget + 2 extra days off to attend courses or conferences.

 - 🌴 28 vacation days to rest, recharge, and travel

 - 🚆 Travel reimbursement to our Utrecht HQ.

 - 📶 Monthly internet & phone allowance to stay con

source_jobs.title: AI-Driven Frontend Internship
source_jobs.description:
As our AI-Driven Frontend Intern, you'll help our engineering teams keep the product fast, clean, and reliable to build on. By fixing well-scoped bugs, chipping away at frontend tech debt, and rotating across teams to support real project deliveries, you'll help Trengo ship a better experience to the thousands of businesses that rely on us, and contribute directly to how we grow.




ABOUT TRENGO

Welcome to the forefront of AI-driven communication. At Trengo, we’re redefining the industry by replacing repetitive work with meaningful conversations through our AI-powered customer engagement platform. We unify communication channels and leverage agentic AI to deliver proactive, human-like service, boosting efficiency for thousands of businesses worldwide.

As a fast-moving Dutch scale-up, backed by a $36M Series A and an official WhatsApp Business Solutions Provider, we thrive on acceleration. Your expertise will drive growth: you’ll make a strategic impact, champion AI innovation, and help shape the product roadmap. You’ll do this alongside an international team guided by our Dynamic pace, Future-proof mindset, Ownership, and Open culture.




WHAT YOUR ROLE LOOKS LIKE:

 - Fix real, well-scoped bugs in our frontend, each one pre-triaged with clear boundaries and reviewed by a senior engineer, so you ship with confidence from day one.

 - Tackle bite-sized pieces of our frontend tech debt and improvement work, turning a large cleanup effort into steady, visible progress.

 - Rotate across our engineering teams, joining a few project deliveries to see how each one works and where you fit best.

 - Lean on AI-powered coding tools (especially Claude Code, alongside Cursor and Codex) to speed up your coding and problem-solving, and pick up the prompting techniques behind AI-augmented development.

 - Question the awkward steps and "why is it this way?" gaps that experience tends to gloss over. Your fresh perspective is part of the value you bring.
   
   


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

We’d love to meet you if you:

 - Are currently studying computer science, software engineering, or a related field, and have picked up some frontend experience through coursework, personal projects, or a first internship.

 - Are available to start in September 2026 and can commit to a 6-month internship for 32–40 hours per week.

 - Have experimented with AI-powered coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Codex, and are eager to build them into how you work.

 - Are comfortable with, or keen to learn, Vue3, Pinia, Vite, or similar modern frontend tooling.

 - Approach problems with curiosity and persistence, and aren't afraid to ask questions when something doesn't make sense.

 - Communicate clearly and enjoy working as part of a small, collaborative team.
   
   


⚙️ OUR TECH & AI MINDSET

AI is not a buzzword at Trengo — it’s part of how we build and operate. You’ll work with AI-driven features, automation, data, or tools that help us move faster and smarter. We value thoughtful use of AI that creates real value for customers and teams.




WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU?

This is what we carefully prepared for you:

 - 🚀 A chance to experiment with AI-Driven Frontend Development and contribute to growth at the intersection of AI and SaaS.

 - 👩‍🏫 1-on-1 mentorship from the Lead Front-end Engineer of a fast-growing SaaS company.

 - 🏗️ A strong onboarding program with hands-on training and a dedicated buddy to set you up for success.

 - 💶 A monthly internship compensation of €500 to support you throughout your internship.

 - 🏡+🏢 Flexible work setup: join us in our beautiful Utrecht HQ and work some days from home.

 - 🧘 Mental health support with free sessions from on-demand psychologists (OpenUp).

 - 📶 Monthly internet & phone allowance to stay connected.

 - 🎉 Team activities throughout the year.

 - 🍴 Daily warm lunches prepared by our workplace experience team when you’re at our beautiful Utrecht office https://www.centralpark-utrecht.nl/en.

 

📅 Please

source_jobs.title: Account Executive (Outbound) - Dutch speaking
source_jobs.description:
At Trengo, we’re on a mission to build the smartest AI-powered customer engagement platform. Our software unites every channel from WhatsApp and Instagram to email and live chat into one shared inbox, helping customer-facing teams replace repetitive tasks with meaningful conversations.

With €36M Series A funding (led by Insight Partners & Peak Capital) and recognition as one of only four official WhatsApp Business Solutions Providers in the Netherlands, we’re scaling across EMEA. That’s where you come in!




THE OPPORTUNITY

As an Outbound Account Executive, you’ll be a key driver of Trengo’s growth by owning the sales cycle for qualified pipeline. This is a role focused on strategic outbound pipeline conversion, from demo to closing mid-market deals. We are looking for a commercially driven professional with an entrepreneurial mindset, eager to sell a product that’s in high demand.




HERE’S WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Own the full sales cycle from SDR-qualified opportunity through nurturing, negotiation, and closing on strategic deals.

 - Partner closely with SDRs on identifying target accounts, streamline messaging, and outbound cadences to keep a healthy, well-qualified pipeline flowing into your desk.

 - Jump into targeted outbound and ABM plays alongside your SDR partner(s) on key accounts and be ready to refine along the way in necessary

 - Leverage AI-driven tools to prepare for meetings, personalize communication, and maximize conversion rates on qualified leads.

 - Lead engaging, tailored commercial demos that address real client challenges that is tied to revenue generation and strong ROI for our potential clients

 - Collaborate with Onboarding and Customer teams to ensure smooth and concrete handovers leading to happy customers.

 - Represent Trengo at industry events and be an ambassador for our AI-first approach.
   
   


WE’D LOVE TO MEET YOU IF YOU:

 - Have 1+ years of full-cycle B2B SaaS sales experience, with proven success in closing mid-market B2B deals.

 - Know your way around sales methodologies (MEDDIC, SPIN, SPICED, etc.).

 - Are entrepreneurial, ambitious, and resilient! You know the sales game really starts with a “no.”

 - Thrive in a customer-first, team-driven environment.

 - AI fluency: you actively use AI to streamline workflows, personalize communication, and close deals more efficiently.

 - Speak Dutch & English fluently (extra languages are a big plus).
   
   


WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU?

We believe in supporting you to perform at your best and grow with us:

 - 🚀 Career growth with clear departmental tracks and support from your manager.

 - 🌍 Hybrid working + 60 days per year to work abroad.

 - 🧘 Mental health support with free sessions from on-demand psychologists (OpenUp).

 - 📚 Learning budget + 2 extra days off to attend courses or conferences.

 - 🌴 28 vacation days to rest, recharge, and travel

 - 🚆 Travel reimbursement to our Utrecht HQ.

 - 📶 Monthly internet & phone allowance to stay connected.

 - 🍴 Daily warm lunches prepared by our workplace experience team when you’re at our beautiful Utrecht office.

 - 💼 Pension contribution to help you plan for the future.

 - 🛫 Sabbatical: After two years, enjoy up to three months away (unpaid) to rest, recharge, or see the world.
   
   


🔍 OUR HIRING PROCESS

 1. Introductory call – First conversation with our Talent team.

 2. Manager interview – Deep dive into experience and expectations.

 3. Practical assignment – Role-related, real-world challenge.

 4. Team connection – Meet future colleagues and confirm mutual fit.

We aim to keep the process clear, fair, and timely, and we’ll keep you informed at every step.






Join us in building the future of customer engagement — we’d love to have you on the team.

👉 Apply today and let’s grow together!

 

We believe great ideas come from diverse perspectives. If you’re excited about this role but don’t meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply.



#LI-Hybrid

#LI-MT1

source_jobs.title: Integrated Marketing Internship
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for a motivated Marketing Intern to support the execution of integrated marketing initiatives while gaining hands-on experience across campaigns, social media, partner marketing, and cross-functional projects.

Working closely with our Integrated Marketing Manager, you’ll help bring marketing plans to life, collaborate with teams across the business, and contribute directly to growing Trengo’s brand and pipeline. This role is ideal for someone with previous internship, project, or extracurricular marketing experience who wants to accelerate their learning in a fast-paced SaaS environment.




ABOUT TRENGO

Welcome to the forefront of AI-driven communication. At Trengo, we’re redefining the industry by replacing repetitive work with meaningful conversations through our AI-powered customer engagement platform. We unify communication channels and leverage agentic AI to deliver proactive, human-like service, boosting efficiency for thousands of businesses worldwide.

As a fast-moving Dutch scale-up, backed by a $36M Series A and an official WhatsApp Business Solutions Provider, we thrive on acceleration. Your expertise will drive growth: you’ll make a strategic impact, champion AI innovation, and help shape the product roadmap. You’ll do this alongside an international team guided by our Dynamic pace, Future-proof mindset, Ownership, and Open culture.




WHAT YOUR ROLE LOOKS LIKE:

 - Support the execution of integrated marketing campaigns across channels including social media, webinars, events, content, and partner initiatives.

 - Create and publish engaging social media content across channels such as LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube, helping strengthen Trengo's brand presence and audience engagement.

 - Coordinate campaign assets, timelines, and stakeholder requests to help ensure smooth and timely delivery of marketing initiatives.

 - Collaborate with partner marketing and other internal teams to support co-marketing activities and cross-functional projects.

 - Turn ideas into action by researching trends, identifying opportunities, and contributing new concepts that improve marketing performance.




WHAT YOU’LL BRING

We’d love to meet you if you:

 - Are currently studying Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field and looking for hands-on marketing experience.

 - Are available to start in September 2026 and can commit to a 6-month internship for 32–40 hours per week.

 - Have gained practical experience creating content for social media through an internship, student project, committee role, personal project, or similar experience.

 - Can write clear, engaging copy and have experience using content creation tools such as Canva, Figma, or similar platforms.

 - Have strong written communication skills and an interest in content creation and social media.

 - Are comfortable learning new tools and technologies, including AI-powered marketing tools and project management platforms.




⚙️ OUR TECH & AI MINDSET

AI is not a buzzword at Trengo — it’s part of how we build and operate. You’ll work with AI-driven features, automation, data, or tools that help us move faster and smarter. We value thoughtful use of AI that creates real value for customers and teams.




WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU?

This is what we carefully prepared for you:

 - 🚀 A chance to experiment with Integrated Marketing and contribute to growth at the intersection of AI and SaaS.

 - 👩‍🏫 1-on-1 mentorship from the Integrated Marketing Manager of a fast-growing SaaS company.

 - 🏗️ A strong onboarding program with hands-on training and a dedicated buddy to set you up for success.

 - 💶 A monthly internship compensation of €500 to support you throughout your internship.

 - 🏡+🏢 Flexible work setup: join us in our beautiful Utrecht HQ and work some days from home.

 - 🧘 Mental health support with free sessions from on-demand psychologists (OpenUp).

 - 📶 Monthly internet & phone allowance to stay connected.

 - 🎉 Team activities th

notes: Mostly sales roles, with a few internships in AI and marketing. No explicit mention of sponsorship or clearance.
